caption: An animated man with a red headband and a blue and red garment stands against a dark, atmospheric background filled with floating geometric shapes like triangles, hexagons, and plus signs. He initially has his right arm raised high in the air, while the text "SUCK IT" appears centered at the bottom of the scene. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his arm and holds a tan, bone-like object in his hand, extending it forward. His expression remains focused, though his eyes are obscured. In the final moments, a bright, glowing light emanates from his eyes, creating a vivid blue flare that illuminates his face. Throughout the entire progression, the text "SUCK IT" remains stationary on the screen, and the colorful floating symbols continue to drift in the background.
